action.reasoning: Starting from scratch. Need to train RL agents on 10 Minigrid environments. Plan: Use PPO from stable-baselines3 with FullyObsWrapper for full grid visibility + custom FlattenWrapper for MLP policy. Train separate models per environment. First iteration: 500K timesteps per env to get baseline score and measure iteration time.
